discoverySummary: Claude Code reads CLAUDE.md natively, so CLAUDE.md is generated as a short bridge to AGENTS.md and .ai.
personalConfigGuidance: Do not rely on project-level .claude for Claude Code settings in this structure; use user-level ~/.claude for personal Claude Code configuration.
rules: CLAUDE.md is a discovery bridge, not the canonical source of shared instructions.
.claude is a pointer to .ai when Claude-specific path identity is activated.
Put shared Claude-specific behavior in .ai/claude/overrides and project-specific Claude behavior in .ai-overlay/claude/overrides.
